EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is widely known as "Inductive Representation Learning on Large Graphs" by William L. Hamilton, Rex Ying, and Jure Leskovec, published in NIPS 2017. The cited authors are a minor variation (Will for William, Zhitao for Rex) of the correct authorship.

LINK: https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2017/hash/5dd9db5e033da9c6fb5ba83c7a7ebea9-Abstract.html
FOUND_TITLE: Inductive Representation Learning on Large Graphs
FOUND_AUTHORS: William L. Hamilton, Rex Ying, Jure Leskovec
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
